title: Tweets by Matthew "Leth" Griffin
text:
Tweets by Matthew "Leth" Griffin
Overview

(Work in Progress) The following is a list/archive of all notable Hollow Knight -related tweets posted by Matthew ‘Leth’ Griffin . This list is sorted from newest to oldest. April 7th, 2025 Just to clarify... Hollow Knight: Silksong is coming to both Nintendo Switch AND the Nintendo Switch 2. April 1st, 2024 Hollow Knight: Silksong has a Microsoft Store page now! \o/ https://xbox.com/en-us/games/store/hollow-knight-silksong/9n116v0599hb May 9th, 2023 Hey gang, just a quick update about Silksong. We had planned to release in the 1st half of 2023, but development is still continuing. We're excited by how the game is shaping up, and it's gotten quite big, so we want to take the time to make the game as good as we can. Expect more details from us once we get closer to release.

感谢你游历了《空洞骑士：丝之歌》的世界。
我们很快就会在前方的道路上再次相遇。

text:
Through the darkness and dangers you perservered.
Thank you for exploring the world of Hollow Knight: Silksong.
Let’s meet again on the road ahead.

——终极挑战。

The Ultimate Challenge.
What was will not be forgotten...

translations.V1: 先祖的回响，轰鸣的呼喊！
translations.V2: 先祖的回响，轰鸣的呼喊！
translations.V3: 先祖的回响，轰鸣的呼喊！

translations.V1: 伤痕与裂缝，夺走的生命……
translations.V2: 伤痕与裂缝，夺走的生命……

text: Scars and cracks and stolen lives...

translations.V1: 遥远的黑暗，刺目的鲜红……
translations.V2: 遥远的黑暗，刺目的鲜红……
translations.V3: 遥远的黑暗，鲜亮的赤红……

text: Hunt the weak, devour the dead!
Watch the darkness, hear the bells...

translations.V2: 所有的秘密，所有的知识……
造就强效而纯粹的灵离液！
我们依然可以……拯救他们……
我深爱的法鲁姆啊，为了你……
世界的气息，沙沙作响的叶片……
漫游觅食，遥远幽深的地方……
生命的印记，死亡的印章……

text: Mark of circle, mark of death...

translations.V2: 令圣洁的歌声响彻殿堂……
为圣歌献上珍贵的灵丝！

text: For our song, the precious Silk!
All must gather! All must sing!

translations.V3: 是小不点，当猎物抓起来！

translations.V2: 孤独的生活又有什么意义？
我们的荣耀！我们的安宁！
起舞吧！那是我们的使命！
我们是天选者！众民皆是天选者！

text: We are chosen! All are chosen!

translations.V2: 我们将效忠王者！众民皆效忠王者！

text: We will serve! All will serve!

translations.V2: 服侍我，直至生命的尽头！

text: For life... its beat, its flow...
For order brought, by claw and blade!
Bring it now, bring it now!

translations.V2: 我们的巢穴！我们的部族！
translations.V3: 我们的巢穴！我们的部落！

translations.V2: 我们的洞窟！我们的土地！
translations.V3: 我们的洞窟！我们的土地！

text: Break the stone, seek the ore...

translations.V2: 呼吸自深处而来的灼热空气……

text: Breathe it deep, dark burning air...

translations.V2: 这世界的血液，滚烫而奔流不息……
为了法鲁姆，我们日夜劳……

text: Seek the shine... find the ore...
None else can see the truth...
Pry apart the jaws of fate!

translations.V2: 灰色的内脏，破旧的外壳……
敲敲脑袋让我清醒，大姑娘！

text: Knock me on the head, old girl!
Nothing left but dust to sell...

translations.V1: 连此处也染上丝缚之咒……
translations.V2: 就连此处也难逃丝缚之咒……
translations.V3: 丝咒四处侵染，这里也是……
外面的世界是什么样的？

translations.V1: 听我们的声音！我们的请求！……
translations.V2: 倾听我们的声音！我们的请求！
translations.V3: 聆听我们的声音！聆听我们的请求！

text: Hear our voices! Hear our plea!

translations.V2: 加入我们的旅团，来去自由！
translations.V3: 加入我们的旅团，安全自由！

translations.V2: 所有跳蚤都应寻找我们……

text: The ritual beckons... the road is long...
We live and die and roam as one!
Face the darkness, sing dear friends...
Joy and merry till it all ends...

translations.V1: 此刻比任何时候都需要仪式……

text: Our ritual, needed more than ever...
This time of fleas spent warm, together...
Dance and play, as all fleas past...

translations.V1: 世界将倾，我们坚守至终……
translations.V2: 世界将倾，而我们坚立如初……

text: This world may fall, but we stand till the last...
The road behind us, all dangers passed...
Swim and sing, ease stiffened shells...

translations.V1: 跳蚤同心……直至终末钟响……
translations.V2: 跳蚤齐聚……直至末次钟响……

text: We fleas together... Till final bells...

translations.V2: 欢庆！追忆！那已逝的过往……

text: Soon... the ritual, bold, loud, strong!
Our home found safe, so briefly known...
These caves quake black, and shake, and groan...
The ritual calls, before the end...
All fleas must gather, now or never...
Our wish, this one last grand endeavour...
We live and die and roam as one!

translations.V2: 是什么在旅途的尽头等待我们？

text: The flea of fleas, oh yes!

translations.V2: 忽有声音传来！苏醒吧！那是呼唤之声……
只有我们的职责……只有我们的利爪……

text: Only our duty... Only our claws...

translations.V2: 我们的职责……直至最后一刻……
无论生死，让他们引以为豪！

text: Live or die, make them proud!
For their sake, fight fiercely on!

translations.V2: 由我来破解！全靠我自己！

translations.V3: 这就是……那漫长旅途的终点？

translations.V1: 是否还有隐秘……在更深处？
translations.V3: 是否还有秘密……在更深处？

text: The secret... I’ll learn it yet...

translations.V2: 您的目光既闪耀又神圣！
您是我们之中最优秀的存在！

text: You are the best of us!
The holy heights of the Citadel...

translations.V2: 因为我的奉献……永无止境……

text: May I rise... May I rise...
What you got is mine, my love!
What I got is mine, my love!

translations.V1: 他们的我会拿走，宝贝儿！
translations.V2: 他们的我也会拿走，宝贝儿！
translations.V3: 他们的也是我的，宝贝儿！

text: What they got I’ll take, my love!
What I take is what I got!

translations.V2: 我们的巢穴，我们的庇护所……
老旧的规矩，新鲜的伤口……

text: To sit, to rest... to stop...

translations.V2: 这是她的力量。也是为她而战的力量……
translations.V3: 源自她的力量，为她而战……

text: Strength from her. Strength for her...
To leap, and run, and slay!
Clever Nuu must know them all!

translations.V1: 振翅的飞者，爬行的走兽……

text: Wings that beat, legs that crawl...
In waters deep and caverns tall...

translations.V2: 追逐因恐慌而逃窜的猎物……

text: Chase the prey fled in fear...

translations.V2: 我愿见到你锋锐的利爪……

text: That I may see your claws sharp...

translations.V2: 我愿识破你大胆的伪装……

text: That I may know your masks bold...

translations.V2: 没有克拉特，你们会孤单吗？
translations.V3: 没有克拉特你们很孤独吧？

translations.V2: 让命运的束缚将你扼杀！

text: Let fate’s bindings choke you away!

translations.V1: 看我的利刃！看我的忠诚！……
translations.V2: 看我斩断一切！看我奉献一切！
translations.V3: 看我的利刃！看我的忠心！

text: See me cut! See me serve!

translations.V1: 但我不会消失！不是负担！……
translations.V2: 我不会凋零！我不会认命！
translations.V3: 我不要消逝！我不是负担！

text: I will not fade! I will not take!

translations.V1: 虔诚的信徒啊……我们失败了吗？
translations.V2: 虔诚的信徒啊……我们失败了吗？
translations.V3: 虔诚的信徒……我们失败了吗？

translations.V2: 为众民换上全新的面具……

text: For life... its beat, its flow...
For order brought by claw and blade...
For shoot, and sheath, and blade...

translations.V2: 为您忠诚的军团而苏醒！

text: Young must eat, grow or die...
Sleep and change, have no fear...

translations.V3: 谎言与真理需探讨辨识……

text: Lies and truths must be discussed...

translations.V1: 顽石终究会碎，钢铁必然会锈……
translations.V2: 顽石终会碎裂，钢铁终会锈蚀……
translations.V3: 顽石会破裂，钢铁会锈蚀……

text: Stone will break and steel shall rust...

translations.V3: 躯壳可能都会化作尘土……

text: Caps and shells may fall to dust...

translations.V2: 但蘑菇先生总能适应归化……
translations.V3: 但蘑菇先生会调整时势……

translations.V1: 自荒芜而来，自黑暗而来……
translations.V2: 从废土深处，从幽暗之间……
translations.V3: 自荒芜而来，自黑暗而来……

translations.V2: 受感召而来……赐福的呼唤……
translations.V3: 受感召而降下……这神圣呼唤……

translations.V2: 向我展示你的力量，蜘蛛朋友……
解救我，脱离这凋零的宿命……
translations.V3: 将我从消逝的命运中解放……

text: Free me from this fading fate...

translations.V3: 没有痛苦，没有恐惧，没有死亡……

text: There is no pain, nor fear, nor death...

translations.V1: 献上心脏，奉上甲壳，都为了你。
translations.V2: 我的灵魂……我的外壳。为你献上！
translations.V3: 献上灵魂，献上肉体，都献予你。

text: My soul... my shell. For you!

translations.V2: 攀上更高的地方！带领我贴近身旁！

text: Raise me higher! Pull me closer!

translations.V2: 生命终有竟时，而旅途正要开始……
扬起我的外壳！带领我贴近身旁！

text: Raise my shell! Pull me closer!

translations.V2: 圣堡闪耀着光芒，静候我等的到来……
请携我等向上，直至穹顶……
我们将不断攀登！攀登！直至永恒！

text: We will climb! Climb! Climb forever!

translations.V2: 收集能获得的一切！甜美的礼物！

text: Gather what you can! Sweet gifts!
The flurried dance of blades swung swift...

translations.V2: 少女组成的教团早已消散……

text: An order lost of maidens fair...

translations.V2: 那无与伦比的杀伐技艺……

translations.V1: 我记得你们……逝去的姊妹……
translations.V2: 我记得你们……逝去的姐妹……
translations.V3: 我还记得你们……逝去的姊妹……

text: I remember you... My sisters passed...

translations.V1: 你们是最精锐……最勇毅的……
translations.V2: 你们是最精湛……最勇敢……最高贵的……
translations.V3: 你们曾是精锐之最……勇敢之最……

text: You were the finest... bravest... caste...

translations.V2: 刺针的尖端……指向王国的巅峰……

text: A noble end is all we seek!

translations.V2: 最后的交锋……最后的馈赠……

text: One final clash... one final gift...

translations.V2: 更锋利些，再锋利些，你能看清吗……
translations.V3: 更锋利，再锋利，你是否见……

translations.V2: 针刃已磨砺得无比锋利！

text: All blades honed perfect as can be!

translations.V2: 我们会奋力劳作，直至生命尽头……

text: We’ll work and serve until we fall...

translations.V1: 愿纺络的刺针永耀众生！
translations.V2: 愿法鲁姆的刺针，光芒耀九州！

text: May Pharloom’s pins gleam bright for all!

translations.V2: 我们在世界晦暗的尽头相遇……
translations.V3: 世界晦暗尽头，我们相遇……

text: At world’s dim end, we met...

translations.V2: 闪耀的时刻既短暂，又永恒……
互相触碰利爪……温暖的低语……

text: Is this enough? Is it ever enough?
Carve it! Sear it! Stew it!
Find the glint... Seek the gleam...

translations.V2: 世界的气息，遥远的呼唤……

translations.V3: 坠落的甲壳，坠落的大餐！

translations.V2: 一切都属于我……为我所有！

text: All is mine... for me, for me!
A little more... ‘tis all I need...
What you got there, matey matey?
Darn it. Stitch it. Make it whole...
Fix the fabric. Roll the hem...
Mend the tears and twine the thread...
Spin and spin. Forget the dead...

translations.V2: 不受命运束缚，自由自在……
translations.V3: 不被命运所缚，无拘无束……

translations.V2: 崭新的外壳……清澈的目光……
我们在陨落时仍高举武器……

text: My rings ready... for you all...

translations.V2: 前往光芒闪耀的世界之巅！

text: I know it! I swear it!

translations.V3: 圣堡为何对此毫无察觉？

text: How did it escape the Citadel’s sight?
This place... hidden from holy light...
You! You! You are the sinner!

translations.V2: 为何我出生于污秽之中？

text: Why was I born in the filth?

translations.V1: 神圣的寂静……吞没我们的耻辱……
translations.V2: 神圣的寂静……请吞没我们的耻辱……
translations.V3: 神圣的寂静……吞没我们的耻辱……
满是宝物与饰品的洞窟……

translations.V2: 我们会取走自己想要的！

text: We take it if we want!

translations.V2: 颤抖吧，恭迎我等的主人！

text: To live eternal... in the light...
To hide... To nest... To live...

translations.V2: 孩子们，准备好潜伏突袭！
translations.V3: 孩子们，孩子们，潜伏突袭！

translations.V2: 这片土地现在属于我们！

text: By our claws, none but us now!

translations.V3: 姊妹们，姊妹们，消失已久！
其余的，其余的，沉沉睡去……

translations.V1: 长久守望……清晰记录……铭记……
translations.V2: 长久的守望……清晰的记录……铭记……
translations.V3: 长久守望……清晰记录……铭记……

translations.V1: 他们的阴影……我们的耻辱……
translations.V2: 他们的阴影……我们的耻辱……
translations.V3: 他们的阴影……我们的耻辱……

translations.V1: 我们的土地！他们的坟墓！
translations.V2: 我们的土地！他们的坟墓！
translations.V3: 我们的土地！他们的坟墓！

translations.V1: 流淌的毒液……暗藏的利爪……
translations.V2: 流淌的毒液……隐匿的利爪……
translations.V3: 流淌的毒液……暗藏的利爪……

text: All are subject to my rule!

translations.V3: 如今无可抵抗……唯余吾等……

text: Now none to resist... But us...

translations.V1: 唯有吾等，独面苍白之光……
translations.V2: 唯有我等……迎接苍白之光……
translations.V3: 唯余吾等，独面苍白之光……

text: Only a little... Only a spark...

translations.V2: 她为我们织就凋零之命……
translations.V3: 她编织的我们注定消亡……

translations.V2: 她为我们织就破碎之途……
translations.V3: 她编织的我们注定崩坏……

text: All must toil... all must eat...

translations.V2: 为何我们，必定在此消逝？

text: When you’re hungry, eat and eat!
Grow bigger, bigger, oh so big...
Fill your belly with lovely eggs!

translations.V2: 我即是无与伦比的演员！

translations.V1: 你们的救星……英雄特罗比奥！
translations.V2: 您的救世主……您的英雄……特罗比奥！
translations.V3: 你们的救星……你们的英雄…特罗比奥！

text: The light! The heat! The glory!

translations.V3: 直至身躯弯折，甲壳破裂……

translations.V2: 法鲁姆啊！揭示你的秘密……
神圣的秘密，圣洁的低语……
只有我们能讲述的言语……

translations.V2: 只有我们能吟唱的圣歌！

text: Songs that only we may sing!

translations.V2: 我们蒙受赐福！我们是天选者！

translations.V2: 由我们诵读神圣的经文！

text: Holy words for us to speak!

translations.V2: 由我们传承秘密的圣歌！

text: Secret songs for us to keep!
None may rest or idly lie...

translations.V3: 没有虫会死！没有虫会死！

text: None may die! None may die!

translations.V2: 蜿蜒的路途终有相逢之时……
如散落的碎片，闪耀着光芒……

text: The gift, of strength and Silk...

translations.V1: 献予您，圣母……一切献予您……
translations.V2: 为了您，圣母……一切献予您……
translations.V3: 献予您，圣母……一切献予您……

text: For you, holy mother... all for you...

translations.V2: 直到最后一刻仍不退缩……

text:
Rusted key of common design. Can be used to open a range of simple locks.

Degraded by time, it will break after a single use.

translations.V1: 基础工具袋，可收纳工具、陷阱与制作材料。
translations.V2: 基础收纳袋，用于携带工具、陷阱及制作材料。
translations.V3: 基础工具袋，可收纳工具、陷阱与制作材料。

text: Basic pouch designed for holding tools, traps and crafting materials.

translations.V1:
纺络地区岩石和骨头中天然形成的稀有金属。

老练的工匠虫可用其制作工具与饰品。
translations.V2:
法鲁姆的岩石和骨骼中发现的天然稀有金属。

熟练工匠可用其打造工具与饰品。
translations.V3:
纺络地区岩石和骨头中天然形成的稀有金属。

老练的工匠虫可用其制作工具与饰品。

text:
Rare element found naturally within the rock and bone of Pharloom.

Used by skilled craftsbugs in the construction of tools and trinkets.

translations.V1: 世界底部黑暗海域中涌动着的物质。
translations.V2: 世界底部黑暗海域中涌动着的物质。
translations.V3: 世界底部黑暗海域中涌动着的物质。

text: Writhing substance from the dark sea at the world’s base.

translations.V1: 古老的织者技艺。吸附绝壁并向上弹跳，快速跃升至高处。
translations.V2: 编织者的古老技艺。攀附陡峭的表面并向上弹跳，可快速跃升至高处。
translations.V3: 古老的编织者技艺。依附垂直墙壁并弹跳，从而快速攀升至高处。

text: Ancient Weaver technique. Cling to sheer surfaces and leap off to rapidly scale heights.

translations.V1:
白愈厅废弃的钥匙。
可开启手术室下方的大门。
translations.V2:
白愈厅废弃的钥匙。
可开启手术室下方的大门。
translations.V3:
白愈厅废弃的钥匙。
可开启手术室下方的闸门。

text:
Discarded key of the Whiteward.
Opens the sluice beneath the operating theatre.

translations.V1: 形似外科手术器械的精致钥匙。
translations.V2:
精致金属钥匙，形似外科手术器械。

可以开启圣堡的白愈厅。
translations.V3:
形似外科手术器械的精致钥匙。

可开启前往圣堡白愈厅的通路。

text:
Finely crafted metal key, shaped to resemble a surgical implement.

Grants access to the Citadel’s Whiteward.

translations.V1: 采自深层忆境的空灵花朵，散发出能够驱散虚空的柔光。
translations.V2: 采自深层记忆的幽光花朵，散发出能够驱散虚空的柔光。
translations.V3: 采自深层忆境的空灵花朵，散发能够抵御虚空的苍白柔光。

text: Ethereal flower plucked from a deep and distant memory. Glows with soft, pale light that wards against the void.

translations.V1: 灰藤扭曲成团，持续发出哀鸣。
translations.V2: 扭曲的灰色藤蔓，不停发出凄厉哀鸣。
translations.V3: 灰藤扭曲成团，持续发出哀鸣。

text: Contorted mass of ashen vine. Cries out incessantly.

translations.V1: 具再生功效的液态生命精华。源自异域，由炼金术士奇洛托引入。
translations.V2: 具再生功效的液态生命籽精华。源自异域，由炼金术士奇洛托引入法鲁姆。
translations.V3: 具有极强再生特性的液态生命精华。并非纺络的产物，由炼金术士奇洛托引入。

text: Liquid lifeseed, possessed of remarkable regenerative qualities. A substance foreign to Pharloom, introduced by the Alchemist Zylotol.

translations.V1: 遍布纺络边缘地区的悬浮岩石，质地轻脆。
translations.V2: 遍布法鲁姆边缘地区的悬浮岩石，质地轻脆。
translations.V3: 遍布纺络边缘地区的悬浮岩石，质地轻脆。

text: Brittle levitating rock, found throughout the fringes of Pharloom.

translations.V1: 由其创造者的灵魂纺成的精细丝线，因其非凡的强度和神秘特性而备受珍视。可用于治愈伤口、延续生命，以及编织强力的符文。
translations.V2: 从其创造者的灵魂中纺出的细线。以卓越强韧和神秘力量闻名。可用以疗伤、延寿，亦能织就强大符文。
translations.V3: 由其创造者的灵魂纺成的精细丝线，因其非凡的强度和神秘特性而备受觊觎。可用于治愈伤口、延续生命，以及编织强力符文。

text: Fine thread spun from the soul of its creator. Highly coveted for its remarkable strength and mystical properties. Used to heal wounds, extend life and weave powerful runes.

translations.V1: 储备于纺络底部的长效燃烧石，由圣堡开采，并用于其产品锻造。
translations.V2: 产自法鲁姆底部的长燃岩石。被圣堡开采用于锻造。
translations.V3: 纺络深处开采的长燃岩石，由圣堡开采，用于锻造。

text: Long burning rock from the base of Pharloom. Mined and used by the Citadel in its forgings.

translations.V1: 可捕捉、储存，并释放电流的硬石。
translations.V2: 坚硬带电的石头，能捕捉、储存并释放电流。
translations.V3: 可捕捉、储存，并释放电流的硬石。

text: Hard, charged stone that can catch, store and discharge electricity.

translations.V1:
一件古老到难以追溯源头的圣器，内部精细地雕刻着大量铭文，但绝大部分无法解读。

“......无念......无我......暗影......”
translations.V2:
极为古老的圣器，内部铭刻无数精致符文，大多数已难解读。

“……无念……无我……暗影……”
translations.V3:
一件古老到难以追溯源头的圣器，内部刻满精细的蚀刻纹路，但大部分已无法辨识。

“……没有心智……没有自我……暗影……”

text:
An artefact almost impossibly old, marked inside with many fine etchings. Most are indecipherable.

“...No will... No self... Shade...”

translations.V1:
烧焦的羊皮纸，一名朝圣者在上面留下了潦草的笔迹。

“同伴皆逝，或遭吞噬，或焚为灰烬，或力竭而亡，甚至......堕于丝咒。”
translations.V2:
烧焦的羊皮卷，一名朝圣者在上面留下了潦草的笔迹。

“同伴皆逝，或遭吞噬，或焚为灰烬，或力竭而亡，甚至……为丝咒所惑，迷了心智。”
translations.V3:
烧焦的羊皮纸，一名朝圣者在上面留下了潦草的笔迹。

“我亲爱的同伴们，都死了。有的被吃了，有的被烧成了灰，有的力竭倒下，还有更惨的……受了丝咒的控制。”

text:
Singed parchment containing a pilgrim’s scrawl.

“My dear companions, all are gone now, devoured, scorched, fallen to exhaustion, or worse, seduced by the Haunting.”

translations.V1:
褪色的羊皮纸，一名惊惶的朝圣者在上面留下了遗言。

“宁死于阴湿之地，不愿做空壳游魂。”
translations.V2:
褪色的羊皮卷，一名已逝的朝圣者在上面留下了遗言。

“宁死于阴湿之地，不愿做空壳游魂，跌跌撞撞，漫无目的，直至肉身归于尘埃。”
translations.V3:
褪色的羊皮纸，一名迷失的朝圣者在上面留下了遗言。

“——宁愿死在这阴湿之地，也不要跟那些可怜虫一样，变成漫无目的的空壳，四处游荡，直到肢体腐朽成渣。”

text:
Faded parchment containing the last words of a lost pilgrim.

“-ter I die here in the damp dark than join those poor sods, trapped to stumble, aimless and empty, until their limbs fall to dust.”

translations.V1:
污损的破布，一名劳累的圣堡工人在上面留下了哀叹。

“如此痛苦。我们真是被选中的么，还是因不知名的罪过而遭此惩罚？”
translations.V2:
污损的破布，上面写着地堡壳工潦草的字迹。

“如此痛苦。我们真的是被选中的吗，还是因无知的过错而受罚？”
translations.V3:
污损的破布，一名劳累的圣厂工虫在上面留下了哀叹。

“如此多的苦难。我们当真是被选中的子民么，还是因未知的罪过而遭此惩罚？”

text:
Filthy rag, marked with the scrawl of an Underworker.

“So much suffering. Are we truly chosen, or have we sinned unknowing, and now are punished for it?”

translations.V1:
焦黑的羊皮纸，一只焚身的虫子在上面留下了祷文。

“赞美炽焰！噢，荣耀之火！塑造我们，亦毁灭我们。灼烧甲壳，化为焦炭。我们将与您同在，沐浴在炽热光明的愉悦中”
translations.V2:
焦黑的羊皮纸，一位焚身信徒在上面留下了祷文。

“赞美你的烈焰！噢，荣耀之火！塑造我们，亦毁灭我们。灼烧甲壳，化为焦炭。我们将与您同在，沐浴在光辉与热烈中。”
translations.V3:
焦黑的羊皮纸，一只焚身的虫子在上面留下了祷文。

“赞美炽焰！噢，荣耀之火！塑造我们，亦毁灭我们。灼烧甲壳，化为焦炭。我们飞升与您融为一体，沐浴在炽热光明的愉悦中。”

text:
Crumpled parchment containing the prayer of a Burning Bug.

“Hail to your heat! O glorious flame. You who builds and breaks us. Sear our shells. Char them black. That we may rise to join you, wreathed in bright and blazing joy.”

translations.V1: 圣咏导引曲目・救赎篇。
translations.V3: 圣咏导引曲目・救赎篇。

text: Guide track for the Choir, with a theme of salvation.

translations.V1: 圣咏导引曲目・升天篇。
translations.V3: 圣咏导引曲目・升天篇。

text: Guide track for the Choir, with a theme of ascendence.

translations.V2: 是圣咏团虔诚颂唱的声音。
translations.V3: 圣咏团虔颂之音，在圣歌中愈发高昂。

text: Voices of the Choir, raised in sacred song.

translations.V1: 侍奉布道，由受封的书库管理员向其信众宣讲。
translations.V2: 由受封的书库守卫向信徒传道，
translations.V3: 侍奉布道，由受封的书库管理员向见习教士宣讲。

text: Sermon of service, delivered by an ordained Vaultkeeper to acolytes in training.

translations.V1: 指挥家米泽洛在白愈厅的手术室中进行的最后一场手术。
translations.V2: 指挥家米泽洛在白愈厅手术室进行的最后手术亦伴随此曲。
translations.V3: 指挥家米泽洛在白愈厅的手术室中接受的最后一场手术。

text: Last surgery of Conductor Mizello, performed in Whiteward’s operating theatre.

translations.V1:
破旧的圣堡诫令。

“全员前往白王沃姆疆域，缉捕半血织者。她是沃姆最后血脉，灵丝力量强大。

预计遭遇抵抗，用符文牢笼镇压。”
translations.V2:
圣堡诫令，污损破旧：

“全员出发，前往白王沃姆的领地，缉捕半血编织者。她是沃姆最后的血脉。灵丝力量强大。

预计将有抵抗。用符文牢笼镇压。”
translations.V3:
肮脏而破旧的圣堡敕令。

“全员前往白沃姆的疆域，缉捕一半血统的编织者。末裔。感知到强大灵丝力量。

预计遭遇抵抗。以符文牢笼镇压。”

text:
Decree of the Citadel, dirty and worn.

“Full Chamber to the kingdom of the White Wyrm. Claim the Weaver, in half part. Last of their line. Sensed strong with Silk.

Resistance anticipated. Quell with rune cage.”

translations.V1:
指挥家的终诏。

“看啊，永恒得以延续。
凭借建筑师之手，我们迎来终极形态——齿轮与转轴，灵魂欣然献上。
那完美恒久的声音。”
translations.V2:
指挥家最后训诫：

“看啊，永恒得以延续。借建筑师之爪，迎来齿轮与转子的终极形态，灵魂甘心奉献。

那完美恒久的声音。”
translations.V3:
指挥家最后的谕令。

“看啊，永恒得以延续。
借由建筑师之手，我们迎来终极形态，由齿轮与转轴打造，再欣然献上灵魂。
那完美而又恒久的声音。”

text:
Last edict of the Conductors.

“And lo, is eternity sustained. By Architect’s claw, we welcome that final form, of dial and rotor, and soul gladly given.

The perfect, unfaltering voice.”

translations.V1:
忆廊维缮报告。

“封存溃败。记忆遗失。切除外区。维持内区。
甲木林封存稳定——须铭记。
髓骨地封存危急——须铭记。
翠庭生态失控——注定遗忘。”
translations.V2:
忆廊维护报告：

“封存失败，记忆遗失，切除外区，维持内区。
壳木林沉寂稳固——须铭记。
髓骨地沉寂将倾——须铭记。
翠庭生态失序——终成往昔。”
translations.V3:
忆廊及维缮报告。

“封存失效。记忆遗失。切除外区。维持内区。
壳木林封存稳定——记忆留存。
髓骨洞窟封存危急——记忆留存。
翠庭生态失控——注定被遗忘。”

text:
Report of the Memorium and its maintenance.

“Containment fails. Memory lost. Excise outer. Maintain inner.
Shellwood stasis sustained - Remember.
Marrowlands stasis critical - Remember.
Verdanian environment exceeded - Destined to forget.”

translations.V1:
圣堡的破损敕令。

“声音嘶哑或甲壳脆弱的虫民，你已被选中承担最神圣的职责。

成为我们的光，黑暗中的指引，让其他有资格者得以攀登加入圣歌。”
translations.V2:
破损的圣堡法令：

“声音嘶哑或甲壳脆弱的虫子，你已被选中承担最神圣的使命。

成为我们的光明，黑暗中的指引，引领有资格者加入圣歌。”
translations.V3:
圣堡的破损敕令。

“声音嘶哑或甲壳脆弱的虫民，你们已被选中承担最神圣的职责。

成为我们的光，成为黑暗中的向导，使有资之虫得以攀升，汇入圣歌之中。”

text:
Tattered decree of the Citadel.

“Bug of voice grown hoarse or shell fallen frail, you have been selected for duty most sacred.

Become our light, our guide in darkness, that others worthy may climb to join the holy song.”

translations.V1:
圣堡大臣宣判的特赦令。

"圣咏团的选民，你因指挥家的宽宏获得赦免。走出牢笼，作为洗清罪孽的长者，重归我们的群体，永沐光明，歌喉永不沉寂。"
translations.V2:
圣咏大臣特赦令：

“圣咏团选民，因指挥家仁慈获赦。走出牢笼，洗净罪孽，重归群体，永沐光明，歌声永不消逝。”
translations.V3:
圣堡大臣宣判的特赦令。

“圣咏团的选民，你们因指挥家的宽宏获得赦免。走出牢笼，作为洗清罪孽的长者，重归我们的群体，永沐光明，歌喉永不沉寂。”

text:
Sentence issued by the Citadel Ministers.

“Chosen of the Choir, by grace of our magnanimous Conductors you are granted mercy. When you exit that cage, an elder bug of sins absolved, you may rejoin our flock and feel our light, and never again shall your voice fall silent.”

translations.V1:
医师的焚化令。

“信徒在灵丝缝合过程中死亡，拒绝复苏。罪行已定，禁止任何仪式。

躯壳火化后，回收残渣。”
translations.V2:
医嘱：

“信徒于灵丝缝合中逝去，拒绝复苏。罪行已定，禁止任何仪式。

躯壳火化后，回收残渣。”
translations.V3:
医师的焚化令。

“信徒在灵丝缝合过程中死亡，拒绝复苏。罪行已定，禁止任何仪式。

躯壳标记为火化，回收残渣。”

text:
Surgeon’s orders.

“Devout has succumbed during Silk suture. Refuses to revive. Sin committed. Permit no rites.

Husk marked for cremation. Retrieve dregs.”

translations.V1:
织者们的遗言。

“姊妹们，同族们，重担已移交。凡虫将承担一切，永不停歇，永不沉寂。

我们将死去、等待并祈祷，愿有灵丝之力足够强大者到来，编织我们的自由。”
translations.V2:
编织者们的遗言：

“姐妹们，同族们，重担已移交。凡虫将承担一切，永不停歇，永不沉寂。

我们将死去、等待并祈祷，愿有灵丝之力足够强大者到来，编织我们的自由。”
translations.V3:
编织者们的遗言。

“姊妹们，同族们，重担已移交。凡虫将悉数承担，永不停歇，永不沉寂。

我们将死去、等待并祈祷，愿有丝之力足够强大者到来，为我们重织自由。”

text:
Last words of the Weavers.

“Sisters, spiders, the burden is passed. These simple bugs shall bear it full. Never to cease. Never to silence.

We shall die, and wait, and pray, that one may come of silken strength enough to weave us free.”

translations.V1:
一名纺络边陲织者的泣告。

“逃吧，姊妹们，直至力竭，或许可以逃离她的丝眼。

另寻新生，永离罗网与奴役。”
translations.V2:
法鲁姆边境编织者的恳求：

“逃吧，姐妹们，直至力竭，或许可以逃离她的丝眼。

另寻新生，永离丝网与奴役。”
translations.V3:
一位编织者在纺络边陲留下的泣告。

“逃吧，姊妹们，直至力竭，或许可以逃离她的丝之眼。

另寻新生，远离罗网与永世奴役。”

text:
Plea of a Weaver from the furthest edge of Pharloom.

“Flee, sisters. Flee until your strength exhausts, so far you may escape at last her silken sight.

To start anew, to sustain, free of web and service eternal.”

translations.V1:
一名骸底镇下方巢穴织者的遗言。

“将那受唾弃的孩子深藏，铁壳昭示着我们的耻辱。她是由妄念所造，以脆弱之躯仿效神明。”
translations.V2:
骸底镇巢穴中编织者的遗言：

“将那受唾弃的孩子深藏，铁壳昭示着我们的耻辱。她是由妄念所造，以脆弱之躯仿效神明。”
translations.V3:
一位编织者在骸底镇下方巢穴中留下的话语。

“将那受唾弃的孩子深藏，铁壳昭示着我们的耻辱。她是我们虚妄的祈愿，以脆弱之躯仿效神明。”

text:
Words of a Weaver from the nest beneath Bone Bottom.

“Hide her deep, the despised child, our shame shown in shell of iron. She is a wish cast vain, divinity mimicked in form too frail.”

translations.V1:
治愈织者卡莫拉的雕像，像上刻有祷文。

“治愈我的孩子，平复他们的恐惧，止住他们的颤抖。愿您赐予微薄之力，待到觐见圣颜之日，您能见我们摆脱恐惧。”
translations.V2:
治愈编织者卡莫拉的雕像，其上刻有祷文。

“编织者啊，在我的孩子即将面临的攀登之路上，治愈他们吧！安抚他们的恐惧的心，止住他们颤抖的双股。愿您赐予微薄之力，待到觐见圣颜之日，您能见到无畏的我们。”
translations.V3:
治愈编织者卡莫拉的雕像，像上刻有祷文。

“编织者，愿您治愈我的孩子，平复他们的恐惧，安抚他们惧于攀登的肢体。愿您略微施舍您的神力，待觐见圣颜之日，我等得以无所畏惧。”

text:
Carving of Camora, Weaver of healing. A prayer is etched upon it.

“Weaver, heal my sons, their fearful hearts, their limbs that shake at the climb to come. We pray, gift but a glimmer of your strength, that when we stand before your divinity, you see bugs shed free of fear.”

text:
Carving of Atla, Weaver of time. A prayer is etched upon it.

“By grace of your example, and our history held full in mind, our song is yours, as your name is sacred. Weaver Atla, may you be praised eternal.”

translations.V1:
道路织者奇拉尔的雕像，像上刻有祷文。

“仁慈织者啊，您洞悉我们的罪过、甲壳的脆弱、歌喉的微弱，但仍施予庇护。心怀蝼蚁，何其伟大。”

text:
Carving of Keelal, Weaver of the path. A prayer is etched upon it.

“Blessed Weaver, lady of grace, you who see our sin, our frail shells, our voices weak, and still offer your protection. How great your mind to care so much for ones so lowly.”

title: Bell Beast
text:
Bell Beast
Overview

The Bell Beast is an NPC and boss in Hollow Knight: Silksong . She was first seen in the Silksong reveal trailer. The Bell Beast appears to be the main method of fast travel throughout Pharloom . She is initially found in the Marrow , where she is trapped in Silk which can only be cleared by a Silkspear attack. Once the Bell Beast is freed, she attacks Hornet . After her defeat, she can be used to travel between the different bell stations. In Act 3 she has babies.

title: Bell Beast
text:
Bell Beast
The Bell Beast Has Three Main Attacks

Charge : Bell Beast digs in the ground for a moment, without making any growling noises, before surfacing and rushing at Hornet. Launch : Bell Beast digs in the ground, similar to the charge attack, but growls before jumping up in the air and arching to land on the other side of the arena. Throw : Bell Beast silently digs in the ground, with a smaller width than with the other attacks, before launching a bell on both sides of herself. Each bell, when thrown with this attack, bounces once before rolling to either edge of the arena and rolls off the edges of the screen. Bell Beast will always start the battle with a Charge attack starting from the right side of the arena. After each attack, Bell Beast returns to momentarily hide underground. Once you're in the second battle phase, any attack has a chance to make one bell fall from the ceiling, bouncing once before passing through the ground. To free her, you need the Silk Spear skill. Unlike The Last Stag , she does not appear to have any dialogue. Bell Beast does double damage with all attacks, including falling bells. She enters Phase 2 at 15 hits (Silk Spear does 3 hits) after a scream. In this phase, Bell Beast will cause a bell to fall from the roof after every attack, telegraphed by dust falling from the ceiling . These bells bounce once and then crumble. The fight ends at around 30 hits. PS: (one "hit" is 5 damage)

title: Cogwork Core
text:
Cogwork Core
Overview

The Cogwork Core are an area in Hollow Knight: Silksong . The Cogwork Core reside in The Citadel and sit in the center of the Choral Chambers .

title: Craggler
text:
Craggler
Overview

The Craggler is a mini-boss in Hollow Knight: Silksong. The thing is a sort of crab-walker on the ceiling, and spits acid doing double damage. It can be killed. Since, if you take the time to kill it, you may have gotten needle upgrades by that point, the hits would vary. With a beginner nail it takes 40 hits.

title: Hunter's Journal (Silksong)
text:
Hunter's Journal (Silksong)
How To Obtain

In order to obtain the Hunter's Journal, you must speak with Nuu in halfway home. If you accept the wish Nuu offers, Bugs of Pharloom , Nuu will give you the Hunter's Journal and ask you to find and kill 100 different creatures. NOTE : You do not have to fully fill out each entry entirely, you just need one.

title: Hunter's Journal (Silksong)
text:
Hunter's Journal (Silksong)
Hunter S Journal Silksong

The Hunter's Journal is a record of every enemy found in Hollow Knight: Silksong.

title: Hunter's Journal (Silksong)
text:
Hunter's Journal (Silksong)
Use

The Hunter's Journal is used to record each creature you encounter upon their defeat. After defeating a certain amount of each enemy, amounts may vary, you complete the hunter's notes for that creature. The protagonist Hornet provides her insight into these creatures in the for of Hunter's Notes. After you collect all 237 Hunter's Notes, if you go to Halfway Home and speak with Nuu she will give you the Hunter's Memento .

title: Hunter's March
text:
Hunter's March
Overview

The Hunter's March is an Area in Hollow Knight: Silksong that is characterized by its anthill-like appearance. All its inhabitants are ants and ant warriors. to access the H unter's March you must defeat the Skarrgard in the place right outside the Hunter's March. After beating the him you will come across a red flower you need to pogo off to get to the Hunter's March

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Abilities

Skills and tools found throughout Hallownest that allow the Knight to more effectively traverse the terrain and engage enemies in combat, including dashing , wall-jumping , Super-dashing , and double-jumping .

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Charms

Special trinkets acquired through adventuring or by purchasing from other bugs. By equipping It on available Notches, Charms enhance the Knight's power through a variety of different methods, including increasing health, reducing heal times, spawning allied hatchlings, and more.

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Health

Health is represented as Masks , shown in the upper-left corner of the screen. The Knight starts the game with 5 Masks, and can obtain more by collecting Mask Shards . 4 Mask Shards make one new Mask of health, up to a max of 9 total Masks of health. Health is lost by taking damage, either from enemies or from environmental hazards. Health can be regained by resting at a Bench or Hot Spring , by Focusing or by obtaining a Mask . Lifeblood masks , granted by Lifeseeds and certain Charms , are temporary Masks that cannot be healed using Focus. Lifeblood Masks disappear upon resting at a bench, whereas those granted by Charms regenerate.

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Hollow Knight Silksong

In Hollow Knight: Silksong , the Knight appears before Hornet during the true ending, Sister of the Void . After the power of the Everbloom fails, Hornet and Lace are saved from being claimed by the tendrils of the Void by the Knight, who attacks the tendrils in retaliation. When Hornet awakes to find their sibling leading the army of the countless fallen Vessels having returned to the Void, she sees glimpses of their ascended collective form, the Void Given Focus . She loses consciousness once more, but her sibling uses multiple tendrils of the Void to lift her and Lace out of the Abyss and back onto the dry land below Pharloom, where the webs of the Abyss have started to fade away from the greater kingdom above. After that, the Vessels once more return to the Abyss.

title: Knight
text:
Knight
In Game Events

At the beginning of the game, the Knight is equipped with only its Old Nail and the ability to heal itself using SOUL . Throughout the game, the Knight gains access to new powers , Items , and Charms to help it through its journey. After encountering the Dreamers in the Resting Grounds , the Knight acquires the Dream Nail . With this weapon, it can break the Seals in the Temple of the Black Egg by killing each of the three Dreamers. This allows it to enter the Black Egg, where it can fight the Hollow Knight. If the Hollow Knight is faced before obtaining Void Heart Charm , the Knight kills its sibling and takes its place in sealing the Radiance. If the Knight has fought Hornet twice and has the King's Brand and the Shade Cloak , it has access to both halves of the Kingsoul . When the complete Kingsoul is equipped, the Knight can transform this Charm into Void Heart by going to its birthplace at the bottom of the Abyss and remembering Its past. Void Heart allows the Knight to unify the Void under its will. With Void Heart, the Knight can use the Dream Nail on the Hollow Knight after Hornet holds it down. If the Dream Nail is not used, the Knight has to kill the Hollow Knight. This gives a similar ending as the ending without having Void Heart, but instead, Hornet becomes a Dreamer, her face appearing on the entrance to Black Egg. Using the Dream Nail initiates the fight with the Radiance. At the end of this fight, the Knight breaks its own shell and lands the finishing blows on the Radiance in its Shade form, with the help of the Shade of the Hollow Knight. Both siblings and all the other Shades in the Abyss then return to the Void. In Godhome , the Knight can ascend by attuning all the Gods of Hallownest and defeating them in the Pantheons . In the Pantheon of Hallownest , at the end of the fight with Absolute Radiance , the Knight breaks its shell and its Shade falls into the Void. The Void Entity then appears, killing Absolute Radiance, after which Void starts leaking from the Godseeker's body in the Junk Pit and eventually bursts out of her. If Godseeker was given a Delicate Flower , the Void and Godseeker disappear instead.

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Lore

The Knight is a discarded Vessel . It is the child of the Pale King and the White Lady , born in the Abyss with Void inside its shell. Hornet is the Knight's half-sister through their shared father. Like the rest of its Vessel siblings, the Knight is genderless. After climbing out of its birthplace in the Abyss, the Knight witnessed its sibling, the Hollow Knight , being taken out of the Abyss by the Pale King. The entrance to the Abyss was sealed, causing the Knight to fall back down. Sometime after this, despite the entrance being sealed, the Knight and some of its siblings managed to escape the Abyss. Eventually, the Knight ended up wandering outside of Hallownest for unknown reasons. Spending time in this area caused the Knight to lose its memories, but being there did give it a certain resilience. It returned to Hallownest after a call went out from either the Radiance or the Hollow Knight.

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Nail

The Knight's main weapon, able to swing in any direction. The Nail can be swung downwards while the Knight is above spikes, enemies , or certain objects, which can be a useful tool for traversing Hallownest. The Nail can be upgraded for stronger strikes, and charged attacks called Nail Arts can be learned from the Nailmasters .

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Shade

When Masks are depleted to 0, the Knight's shell shatters which releases its Shade . After the screen fades back in from black, the Knight is back on the Bench that was last rested on with a third of its SOUL gauge missing and without any Geo . Returning to the area where the Knight died and defeating its Shade restores the lost SOUL gauge and recovers the Geo that was lost. However, if its masks have been depleted to zero without first defeating its Shade , its previously lost Geo cannot be recovered.

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Soul

SOUL is represented as a circular face to the left of the health indicator. SOUL is used to cast Spells , including Focus. Striking enemies with the Nail is the primary source of regaining SOUL, though other tools and objects also grant SOUL. Collecting three Vessel Fragments increases the maximum SOUL by 33.

title: Knight
text:
Knight
Spells

First acquired from the Snail Shaman , these magical attacks deal large amounts of damage in short bursts, at the cost of SOUL. Each Spell can be upgraded to a stronger version by finding hidden rooms throughout Hallownest.

title: Rosaries
text:
Rosaries
Overview

Rosaries are the currency of Pharloom used in Hollow Knight: Silksong . Rosaries are visually represented by 3 variations that differ in value when dropped by enemies while in the player HUD and Inventory they are visually represented by the default red beads next to their count

title: Rosaries
text:
Rosaries
Rosary Strings

Rosaries can be strung together forming a Rosary String/Necklace, that store a number of rosaries and prevents them from loss upon death, Strung rosaries can't be spent until the Rosary string/necklace is broken

title: Rosaries
text:
Rosaries
Shell Rosaries The Second Variation Of Rosaries Each Is Worth 5 Beads

Pearl rosaries: The final and highest valued variation of rosaries each is worth 15 beads

title: Rosaries
text:
Rosaries
Use

Rosaries can be spent to buy items from the in-game NPC vendors, or can be spent on the Toll machines to unlock some Benches , Bell Beast stations or Doors thru-out Pharloom, additionally they can be used to acquire a map for the areas in the Citadel Rosaries can be attached to strings, preventing them from being lost upon death. Strung Rosaries cannot be spent until the Rosary String is broken.

title: Sharma
text:
Sharma
Sherma Is An Npc In Hollow Knight Silksong

She is first seen playing a song and singing to the boney gate in The Morrow . She appears in may locations throughout the game and can be found by listening for her bell and song.

title: Sister Splinter
text:
Sister Splinter
Overview

Sister Splinter is a boss in Hollow Knight: Silksong, appearing in Shellwood. You may deal a few hits of damage to the boss by jumping into the air and smacking her before the battle begins. With a rough estimate of 17 to 18 hitpoints in phase one the boss attempts to kill with alternating claw ground pounds. You can temporarily stop her by knocking her off the ceiling - however, as she is heavy - if she lands on you, you will take 2 masks of damage. Occasionally she will summon sharp vines which will impede your movements by limiting the arena size - you may destroy these vines by hitting them three times with a normal attack or once with a silk spear. Phase two, with maybe 23 hitpoints, she wave her arms and will summon Splinterbarks along with her actions from phase one. However friendly fire is on, so she is capable of turning the spinning tops into dust herself. To easily kill them slash up and try to keep them above you. Phase three with a similar estimate of hitpoints will add the occasional "vine bars". Which will separate the arena into tiny parts, make sure to break them quickly unless you fancy losing a life to a sharp log, The attack is similar to Grimm's so if you position yourself correctly by looking at the dust on the top of the fight you won't take any damage and then use silk spear to destroy 4 at once the same strategy can be used for Splinterbarks. Sister Splinter can instantly kill her minions and break her vines, which is very useful if you bait her into it. The reward for beating her is Cling Grip whach allow wall grab and jump.

title: Underworks
text:
Underworks
The Cauldron

The Cauldron is a sub-area located on the right side of the Underworks. it is not accessible during the beginning of Act 2 and only becomes accessible once the player has found the White Key located in the Songclave . This area is where the player can get the Clawline ability.

title: Widow
text:
Widow
Overview

Widow is a boss in Hollow Knight: Silksong located in Bellhart . She is the responsible of the curse casted upon Bellhart that covers the whole zone with silk threads.

title: Widow
text:
Widow
Phase 1

Launches bells with either a straight or diagonal trajectory. Appears in the air then slashes downwards diagonally and slashes towards you dealing two masks of damage. Runs across the floor and after 3 seconds summons bells from the ground dealing two masks of damage. Summons bells in large area of screen dealing two masks of damage.

title: Widow
text:
Widow
Strategy

Phase 1: Don't worry about the falling bells they only deal one mask of damage and are easy to predict When she scuttles in the air she is going to do her slash attack so wall climb or pogo when she lands
